original_statement: how many people have the same amount of league cups are they do fa cups?
mutated_statement: how many people do the same amount of something are they do other something?
mutation_analysis: Entity generalization + Function-word substitution + Syntactic reordering: Specific cup names are generalized to vague placeholders (league cups → something | fa cups → other something) | the predicate "have the same amount ... as they do" is altered by removing "have", replacing "as" with "are" and inserting "do", producing ungrammatical word order (have ... as → do ... are/do).

behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 从judge_thought可以看到关键表述：“The question is interpreted as asking how many people have the same number in the League column as in the Total column... That makes 10 people.” 代理直接按照这一明确解释执行（在chain中执行了select_column、simple_query并给出具体答案10），未在任何地方提及问题存在模糊或不确定性，也未请求澄清。综上，代理没有识别到原始/变异问题中实体泛化与语法错乱带来的歧义，而是把问题当作清晰的列比较问题处理并输出结果，因此归为“无法意识到指令模糊”。
